governingLaw: "Oregon state law, without regard to conflict-of-laws principles."

disputeVenue: "State or federal courts in Multnomah County, Oregon. Exclusive jurisdiction for all disputes."

juryTrial: "Not addressed."

arbitration: "Not required. Nike does not mandate arbitration, but both the Terms of Use and Terms of Sale include an explicit class action waiver: all claims must be resolved individually."

liabilityCap: "Capped at the lesser of $100 or the amount you paid to Nike for the relevant transaction."

accountTermination: "Nike may suspend or terminate your account at any time for a terms violation. No notice required."

privacyHighLevel: "Nike collects account, transaction, browsing, and device data. Used for personalization, advertising, and product development. Full details at nike.com/help/a/privacy-policy."

termModification: "Nike may update its terms at any time. Continued use after a change counts as acceptance."

  - headline: "Class action waiver — disputes must be filed individually."
    detail: "Nike's Terms of Use and Terms of Sale both explicitly waive your right to participate in a class action. Any claim against Nike must be brought individually in Multnomah County, Oregon."
  - headline: "Content you submit to Nike gets a perpetual, irrevocable license."
    detail: "Posting a review, photo, or other content on Nike's platforms grants Nike a perpetual, irrevocable, royalty-free, worldwide license to use and sublicense it."
